{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"202603201640004A6F18477BD0349A5EC0\"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7579164104792605465","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"太真实了 一看就是打过工的，开头看的我都憋屈啊小白一个[委屈]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764670221,"group_id":"7579129609636039705","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/6MmdsyHi5cU/Rq/Rgq2ESLPF1XvWCg+QTZEIXrLjKF","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2881197068791581","user_name":"松鹤堂的穆渊"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2881197068791581","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7579129609636039705","book_info":{"abstract":"这些厂里的故事，大多是好些年前的零碎记忆了。没有刻意梳理过顺序，也记不清所有细节的来龙去脉，基本是想到哪写到哪，甚至偶尔会突然想起某个被遗漏的片段，就顺势补进章节里。可能情节不够连贯，时间线也有些模糊，但每一件事、每一个人的样子，都是实打实印在记忆里的。就当是借着文字，把当年憋在心里的吐槽和看到的八卦，慢慢倒出来，权当给过去的打工时光留个念想。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/361998d2ad89b238cc05b410fa09acfe~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"舟山群岛的叶兄","author_id":"","book_id":"7579129609636039705","book_name":"工厂生存实录：我的打工吐槽日记","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303830","creation_status":"4","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":79,\"name\":\"年代\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=79\u0026name=年代\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":127,\"name\":\"职场\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=127\u0026name=职场\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":871,\"name\":\"第一人称\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=871\u0026name=第一人称\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":484,\"name\":\"HE\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=484\u0026name=HE\u00
